questions.stem: I ______ the book already. It was really interesting.
questions.explanation: 本题考查现在完成时与一般过去时的区别。句中的already（已经）是现在完成时的典型时间标志词，强调过去发生的动作对现在造成的影响或结果（已经读完了）。一般过去时只表示过去某个时间点发生的动作，不与already连用；现在进行时表示正在进行的动作；一般将来时表示将要发生的动作。解题技巧：看到already/yet/just/ever/never等词，优先考虑现在完成时（have/has + 过去分词）。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The girl ______ won the singing competition is my classmate.
questions.explanation: 本题考查定语从句关系代词的选择。先行词是the girl（指人），且关系代词在从句中作主语（won的主语），因此用who。which用于指物；whom用于指人但在从句中作宾语；whose表示'……的'，在从句中作定语。解题技巧：指人作主语用who，指人作宾语用whom/who，指物用which/that，表所属用whose。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: Many trees ______ by the students in our school last spring.
questions.explanation: 本题考查被动语态的时态。主语Many trees与动词plant之间是被动关系（树被种植），时间状语last spring表明是一般过去时，因此用一般过去时的被动语态were planted。A是主动语态原形；B是主动语态过去式；D是一般现在时被动语态，时态不符。解题技巧：被动语态基本结构为'be + 过去分词'，确定时态看时间状语，确定单复数看主语。
questions.label: 语法题

options: A. where is the nearest bookstore
B. where the nearest bookstore is
C. where does the nearest bookstore lie
D. where the nearest bookstore was
questions.explanation: 本题考查宾语从句的语序和时态。宾语从句必须使用陈述句语序（主语+谓语），排除A和C（疑问句语序）。主句Could you tell me是委婉请求，并非过去时，因此从句用现在时is，不用过去时was。解题技巧：宾语从句三要素——陈述语序、时态呼应（主过从过，主现从任）、连接词选择。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: It's raining heavily outside. Please take an umbrella with you, ______ you'll get wet.
questions.explanation: 本题考查连词在语境中的逻辑关系。根据句意'外面雨下得很大，请带上雨伞，______你会淋湿的'，前后是转折条件关系，or在此处意为'否则，不然'。and表并列/顺承；but表转折；so表结果。解题技巧：'祈使句 + or + 陈述句'表示'……否则……'，'祈使句 + and + 陈述句'表示'……那么……'。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: We need to ______ a good solution to the environmental problem.
questions.explanation: 本题考查动词短语辨析。come up with意为'想出，提出（方案、主意等）'；come out意为'出版，出现，开花'；come across意为'偶然遇见/发现'；come true意为'实现'。根据宾语solution（解决方案），应选择'想出方案'。解题技巧：记住come的常见短语——come up with提出，come out出来/出版，come across偶遇，come from来自，come back回来。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: The ______ news made all of us very ______.
questions.explanation: 本题考查-ing形容词与-ed形容词的用法区别。exciting意为'令人兴奋的'，用于修饰事物（news）；excited意为'感到兴奋的'，用于修饰人（us）。口诀：'-ing形容物，-ed形容人'，即'物令ing，人感ed'。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.explanation: 本题考查固定搭配。take part in是固定短语，意为'参加'。make、have、get与part in均不能构成此搭配。解题技巧：记住常见搭配——take part in参加（活动），join加入（组织/人），attend出席（会议/课程）。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school organized a meaningful environmental protection activity. All the students in Grade 8 were asked to (8)______ part in it. The activity aimed to make us understand the (9)______ of protecting our environment and taking care of our city.

On that sunny Saturday morning, we gathered at the school gate at 8 o'clock. Then we walked to a nearby community park together. When we arrived, our teacher divided us into several groups and assigned different tasks to each group. Some students were responsible for picking up rubbish on the ground, (10)______ others were asked to water the young trees and flowers. I was in the group responsible for putting up warning signs around the park. The signs said "No (11)______" and "Keep Off the Grass". We also handed out leaflets to visitors to tell them the importance of keeping the park clean.

Although we felt tired after the whole day's work, we were very happy and proud. Through this practical activity, we not only learned how to work together as a team but also realized that everyone should (12)______ an active role in making our hometown a better place. It was truly an unforgettable experience for all of us.

questions.explanation: 本题考查语境理解与词性辨析。定冠词the后需接名词，构成'the + n. + of'结构。importance（重要性）是名词，符合句意'保护环境的重要性'。different（不同的）、difficult（困难的）是形容词；interesting（有趣的）虽是形容词，但语义不符。解题技巧：看到'the ___ of'结构，空格处通常填名词。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school organized a meaningful environmental protection activity. All the students in Grade 8 were asked to (8)______ part in it. The activity aimed to make us understand the (9)______ of protecting our environment and taking care of our city.

I was in the group responsible for putting up warning signs around the park. The signs said "No (11)______" and "Keep Off the Grass". We also handed out leaflets to visitors to tell them the importance of keeping the park clean.

Although we felt tired after the whole day's work, we were very happy and proud. Through this practical activity, we not only learned how to work together as a team but also realized that everyone should (12)______ an active role in making our hometown a better place. It was truly an unforgettable experience for all of us.

questions.explanation: 本题考查逻辑关系与连词用法。while在此处表示对比关系，意为'而，然而'，连接两个并列分句'Some students...'和'others...'，表示两组人同时做不同的事情。because表原因；if表条件；unless表'除非'。解题技巧：while除了'当……时候'，还可表对比，相当于'but'，用于连接两个相反或不同的情况。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:

questions.explanation: 本题考查标识语的固定表达。'No + 动名词'是标识语的常用结构，表示'禁止做某事'，No littering意为'禁止乱扔垃圾'。类似表达：No smoking（禁止吸烟）、No parking（禁止停车）。解题技巧：标识语中No后接动名词（doing），不接不定式或原形。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school organized a meaningful environmental protection activity. All the students in Grade 8 were asked to (8)______ part in it. The activity aimed to make us understand the (9)______ of protecting our environment and taking care of our city.

On that sunny Saturday morning, we gathered at the school gate at 8 o'clock. Then we walked to a nearby community park together. questions.explanation: 本题考查固定搭配。play a role in...是固定短语，意为'在……中起作用/扮演角色'，也可说play a part in。句意为'每个人都应该在让家乡变得更美好方面发挥作用'。take part in参加（活动）；make制造；do做。解题技巧：记住固定搭配——play a role/part in发挥作用，take part in参加。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:

questions.stem: How many hours of sleep do teenagers need every night according to the passage?
questions.explanation: 本题为细节理解题。根据文章第二段最后一句'For teenagers, experts recommend getting about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night...'可知，青少年每晚需要8-10小时睡眠。解题技巧：细节题采用'关键词定位法'，在题干中找关键词（teenagers/hours of sleep），快速回原文定位相关句子，仔细比对选项与原文的同义表达。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解
questions.group_passage:
Do you know how to keep your brain healthy and active? Many people hold the mistaken belief that only elderly people need to worry about their brain health. However, according to scientific research, we should start taking good care of our brains from a young age. The habits we form during our teenage years can have a lasting impact on our cognitive function throughout life.

First and foremost, getting sufficient sleep is essential for brain health. Studies demonstrate that sleep helps the brain remove waste products that accumulate during the day. For teenagers, experts recommend getting about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night to ensure optimal brain performance.

Second, engaging in regular physical exercise is beneficial for the brain. When you participate in activities such as running or playing basketball, your heart pumps more oxygen-rich blood to your brain. This helps improve memory, concentration, and mental clarity.

Third, maintaining a healthy diet matters significantly too. Foods rich in omega-3 fatty acids, such as fish and walnuts, are particularly good for brain function. Additionally, colorful fruits contain antioxidants that protect brain cells.

Another way to keep your brain sharp is to learn new things. You could learn a new language, play a musical instrument, or try a new sport. These activities create new neural connections in your brain.

Finally, maintaining strong social connections is important for brain health. Having meaningful conversations with friends exercises your brain and reduces stress.

questions.stem: What can we infer from the passage?
options: A. Only old people need to care about brain health.
B. Learning new things is useless for teenagers.
C. Exercise can help improve brain function.
D. We should avoid talking with others to protect the brain.
questions.explanation: 本题为推理判断题。A项与第一段'Many people hold the mistaken belief...'相悖；B项与第五段内容相悖；D项与最后一段'maintaining strong social connections is important'相悖。C项可由第三段'This helps improve memory, concentration, and mental clarity'推断得出，运动能改善大脑功能。解题技巧：推理题要基于原文信息进行合理推断，不能选与原文明确矛盾的选项，也不能选原文未提及的过度推断。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断
questions.group_passage:
Do you know how to keep your brain healthy and active? Many people hold the mistaken belief that only elderly people need to worry about their brain health. However, according to scientific research, we should start taking good care of our brains from a young age. The habits we form during our teenage years can have a lasting impact on our cognitive function throughout life.

First and foremost, getting sufficient sleep is essential for brain health. Studies demonstrate that sleep helps the brain remove waste products that accumulate during the day. For teenagers, experts recommend getting about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night to ensure optimal brain performance.

Second, engaging in regular physical exercise is beneficial for the brain. When you participate in activities such as running or playing basketball, your heart pumps more oxygen-rich blood to your brain. This helps improve memory, concentration, and mental clarity.

Third, maintaining a healthy diet matters significantly too. Foods rich in omega-3 fatty acids, such as fish and walnuts, are particularly good for brain function. Additionally, colorful fruits contain antioxidants that protect brain cells.

Another way to keep your brain sharp is to learn new things. You could learn a new language, play a musical instrument, or try a new sport. These activities create new neural connections in your brain.

Finally, maintaining strong social connections is important for brain health. Having meaningful conversations with friends exercises your brain and reduces stress.

questions.stem: The underlined word 'remove' in Paragraph 2 probably means ______.
questions.explanation: 本题为词义猜测题。根据上下文'睡眠帮助大脑______白天积累的废物'，结合逻辑，应该是'清除、带走'废物。remove意为'移除，去掉'，与take away同义。produce生产；increase增加；create创造，均不符合语境。解题技巧：词义猜测可通过上下文逻辑（废物需要被清除）、同义词/反义词、构词法（re-再+move移动）或代入法验证。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测
questions.group_passage:
Do you know how to keep your brain healthy and active? Many people hold the mistaken belief that only elderly people need to worry about their brain health. However, according to scientific research, we should start taking good care of our brains from a young age. The habits we form during our teenage years can have a lasting impact on our cognitive function throughout life.

First and foremost, getting sufficient sleep is essential for brain health. Studies demonstrate that sleep helps the brain remove waste products that accumulate during the day. For teenagers, experts recommend getting about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night to ensure optimal brain performance.

Second, engaging in regular physical exercise is beneficial for the brain. When you participate in activities such as running or playing basketball, your heart pumps more oxygen-rich blood to your brain. This helps improve memory, concentration, and mental clarity.

Third, maintaining a healthy diet matters significantly too. Foods rich in omega-3 fatty acids, such as fish and walnuts, are particularly good for brain function. Additionally, colorful fruits contain antioxidants that protect brain cells.

Another way to keep your brain sharp is to learn new things. You could learn a new language, play a musical instrument, or try a new sport. These activities create new neural connections in your brain.

Finally, maintaining strong social connections is important for brain health. Having meaningful conversations with friends exercises your brain and reduces stress.

questions.stem: What is the best title for this passage?
options: C. Ways to Keep Your Brain Healthy
questions.explanation: 本题考查主旨大意/最佳标题。文章首句'Do you know how to keep your brain healthy and active?'即点明主题，随后从睡眠、运动、饮食、学习新事物、社交五个方面介绍保持大脑健康的方法。A、B、D仅涉及其中一个方面，过于片面。C项'保持大脑健康的方法'概括全文。解题技巧：最佳标题要能概括全文主要内容，不能太大（如Health）也不能太片面（只涉及某一段），通常首段或尾段会出现主题句。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意
questions.group_passage:
Do you know how to keep your brain healthy and active? Many people hold the mistaken belief that only elderly people need to worry about their brain health. However, according to scientific research, we should start taking good care of our brains from a young age. The habits we form during our teenage years can have a lasting impact on our cognitive function throughout life.

First and foremost, getting sufficient sleep is essential for brain health. Studies demonstrate that sleep helps the brain remove waste products that accumulate during the day. For teenagers, experts recommend getting about 8 to 10 hours of sleep every night to ensure optimal brain performance.

Second, engaging in regular physical exercise is beneficial for the brain. When you participate in activities such as running or playing basketball, your heart pumps more oxygen-rich blood to your brain. This helps improve memory, concentration, and mental clarity.

Third, maintaining a healthy diet matters significantly too. Foods rich in omega-3 fatty acids, such as fish and walnuts, are particularly good for brain function. Additionally, colorful fruits contain antioxidants that protect brain cells.

Another way to keep your brain sharp is to learn new things. You could learn a new language, play a musical instrument, or try a new sport. These activities create new neural connections in your brain.

Finally, maintaining strong social connections is important for brain health. Having meaningful conversations with friends exercises your brain and reduces stress.

options: A. However, academic performance is not everything.
B. In addition, building good relationships with classmates is essential.
C. They can make your school life more colorful.
D. To begin with, developing good study habits is very important.
E. Finally, don't forget to look after your health.
questions.explanation: 本题考查段落主旨句与连接词。空后内容'First...Second...'讲的是上课认真听讲、做笔记、按时完成作业等学习习惯，因此选D'首先，养成良好的学习习惯非常重要'。To begin with与First呼应，符合'总-分'结构。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
Being a good student is not only about getting good grades in exams. It also means developing good habits, maintaining a positive attitude, and growing as a well-rounded person. Here are some practical tips that can help you become a better student.

(17)______ First, listen carefully in class and pay attention to what teachers say. Taking clear and organized notes can help you remember important points and review them later. Second, finish your homework on time and take it seriously. If you have any questions or difficulties, don't hesitate to ask your teachers or classmates for help immediately.

(18)______ Getting on well with others is extremely important in school life. Try to be friendly, understanding, and helpful to those around you. When your classmates are in trouble or facing difficulties, be willing to give them a hand and offer your support sincerely.

Besides, it's necessary to take part in various after-school activities. (19)______ You can join clubs based on your personal interests, such as the science club, the art club, or the sports team. These activities can help you develop your hobbies, discover new talents, and make friends who share similar interests.

(20)______ Remember to eat healthily, get enough sleep, and exercise regularly. Physical health is the foundation of everything. Only with a strong and healthy body can you have enough energy to study better and achieve your goals.

options: A. However, academic performance is not everything.
B. In addition, building good relationships with classmates is essential.
C. They can make your school life more colorful.
D. To begin with, developing good study habits is very important.
E. Finally, don't forget to look after your health.
questions.explanation: 本题考查段落衔接。空后内容讲的是'与同学相处融洽很重要'，与B项'此外，与同学建立良好关系至关重要'完全对应。In addition表示递进，引出第二个建议（第一点讲学习习惯，第二点讲人际关系）。
questions.label: 短文填空

Second, finish your homework on time and take it seriously. If you have any questions or difficulties, don't hesitate to ask your teachers or classmates for help immediately.

(18)______ Getting on well with others is extremely important in school life. Try to be friendly, understanding, and helpful to those around you. When your classmates are in trouble or facing difficulties, be willing to give them a hand and offer your support sincerely.

(20)______ Remember to eat healthily, get enough sleep, and exercise regularly. Physical health is the foundation of everything. Only with a strong and healthy body can you have enough energy to study better and achieve your goals.

options: A. However, academic performance is not everything.
B. In addition, building good relationships with classmates is essential.
C. They can make your school life more colorful.
D. To begin with, developing good study habits is very important.
E. Finally, don't forget to look after your health.
questions.explanation: 本题考查代词指代与逻辑衔接。空前提到'参加课外活动'，C项'它们能让你的学校生活更加丰富多彩'中的They指代前文的after-school activities，说明参加活动的好处，承接自然。

options: A. However, academic performance is not everything.
B. In addition, building good relationships with classmates is essential.
C. They can make your school life more colorful.
D. To begin with, developing good study habits is very important.
E. Finally, don't forget to look after your health.
questions.explanation: 本题考查段落衔接与顺序。文章结构为'总-分'，分述部分按'First...Second...Besides...Finally...'排列。此处为最后一段，应选E'最后，不要忘记照顾好自己的健康'。空后内容'健康饮食、充足睡眠、规律锻炼'均与健康相关。
